content.text: Claude is strongly capable in software development tasks. This includes:
: From a description of what you want, Claude can generate code in many languages (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Java, SQL, etc.), including complete functions, scripts, or small programs.
: Paste a snippet of code and ask Claude to explain what it does, how it works, and what each part is responsible for.
: You can share an error message and the relevant code; Claude can suggest likely causes and concrete fixes.
: It can rewrite code to be more readable, efficient, or modular, while preserving behavior.
: For larger systems, Claude can help design module structures, APIs, data models, and propose patterns for distributed systems or cloud-native applications.
: It can generate docstrings, READMEs, API docs, and inline comments.

, this capability is more build-oriented: it’s the experience where you go from a prompt to actual working code, possibly including project scaffolding, file creation, and iterative development. This is especially useful when you want to build small apps, scripts, or prototypes directly with AI assistance.
